name: Eagle Crest Golf Club
address: Golf Club, 1201 S Huron St, Ypsilanti, MI 48197
about: Eagle Crest Golf Club is a public and collegiate golf facility owned by Eastern Michigan University, featuring an 18-hole course and four indoor Trackman simulator bays. The venue offers a dual experience with outdoor golf in warmer months and indoor simulation year-round, adjacent to the Lakeview Restaurant and Bar for integrated dining options. Their Trackman simulator facility allows golfers to play world-renowned courses or practice with food and beverage service available, making it a versatile destination for both on-course and off-season play.
why_golfers_like_it: On-site dining with full bar service
Flexible hourly bay rentals and memberships
Available for both practice and virtual play on famous courses

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available at Lakeview Restaurant & Bar, with winter menu downloadable online
Full bar service available at the restaurant, adjacent to simulator bays

simulator_hardware.notes: Four brand-new indoor Trackman simulator bays, opened in November 2023

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't explicitly state club rental availability, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs. They do offer club fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned, but the venue has an on-site restaurant and bar (Lakeview Restaurant & Bar) with full menu and bar service available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content doesn't specify exact timing for simulator rounds, but Trackman simulator sessions are typically rented by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Eagle Crest is described as family-friendly and open to the public, making it suitable for golfers of all ages, including juniors and youth players.
